tools.name: list_categories
tools.title: List decoration categories
tools.description: List all decoration service categories offered by Decorza Events (birthday, anniversary, haldi, baby shower, theme birthday, etc.) with starting prices, ratings and short descriptions.

tools.name: list_packages
tools.title: List decoration packages
tools.description: List Decorza Events decoration packages. Optionally filter by category slug (e.g. 'birthday-decoration', 'anniversary-decoration', 'baby-shower-decoration'). Returns package id, name, price, tier and short description. Use list_categories to discover valid slugs.

categorySlug.description: Optional category slug to filter packages by.

limit.description: Optional max number of packages to return (default 50).

tools.name: get_package
tools.title: Get decoration package details
tools.description: Get full details for a single Decorza Events decoration package by id, including long description, what's included, pricing and duration.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.title: Get Decorza Events contact info
tools.description: Get Decorza Events business contact info: brand name, WhatsApp number, email, service cities and a ready-to-open WhatsApp booking link.
